mapper.select: SELECT e.id AS sync_event_id, e.block_rule_id AS block_rule_id, e.operation_type AS operation_type, e.provider_code AS provider_code, r.rule_type AS rule_type, r.rule_value AS rule_value FROM admin_security_waf_sync_event e LEFT JOIN admin_security_block_rule r ON r.id = e.block_rule_id WHERE e.status IN ('QUEUED', 'PENDING') ORDER BY e.requested_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT id, provider_code, provider_type, mode, enabled, endpoint_url, config_json FROM admin_security_provider_config WHERE provider_type = 'WAF' AND enabled = 1 ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_security_waf_sync_event SET status = #{status}, response_payload_json = #{responseJson}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, processed_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
